mapper.select: select count(*) from department where com_id = #{comId}
select coalesce(max(sort_order), 0) from department where com_id = #{comId} and (parent_id = #{parentId} OR (parent_id IS NULL AND #{parentId} IS NULL))
mapper.insert: insert into department (company_id, parent_id, dept_name, dept_code, depth, sort_order) value (#{companyId}, #{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{deptCode}, #{depth}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: select count(*) from department where parent_id = #{deptId}

with recursive childTree as ( select dept_id from department where parent_id = #{deptId} union all select d.dept_id from department d join childTree c on d.parent_id = c.dept_id ) select dept_id from childTree
